user.title: Aqara Local Camera
user.description: Enter the RTSP details from the Aqara app (Camera settings → RTSP). Defaults match the Aqara G410.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the RTSP port. Check the IP/port and that RTSP is enabled in the Aqara app.

abort.not_a_camera: This Aqara device has no RTSP camera (e.g. an M100 hub) and was skipped.
